name: expert-mind-skill
description: Alexey Vorobey's experimental expert circle for Claude Code — a rotating set of 16 distilled mental models from named professionals (Eric Seufert, Andrew Chen, Elena Verna, …), auto-refreshing on cadence from LinkedIn, RSS, YouTube, podcasts.

plugins.name: expert-mind-skill
plugins.description: Build and maintain Claude Skills representing your favourite experts' worldviews. 16 bundled skills on day one; add your own via /expert-mind-skill:init. Invoke any expert by name, by domain ("mobile UA expert"), or by group ("growth experts").
